name: @listmonk-ops/abtest
description: A/B testing orchestration and statistical analysis for Listmonk

scripts.build: bun run clean && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly && esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=dist/index.js --minify --external:@listmonk-ops/common --external:@listmonk-ops/openapi
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun run build && bun run test
